creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
grep(1) supports searching binary files, so one can easily find where non-mangled (or non-encrypted) strings come from then use pkg-which(8) to get the affected port/package. For example, there's nothing to fix in devel/dbus itself.

$ pkg info -ql dbus | xargs fgrep /var/local || echo exit code $?
exit code 1
